testcase.name: test_04_search_reese_hoban
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_excel_import.py:99: in test_04_search_reese_hoban assert balance == 45, f"Expected balance 45, got {balance}" E AssertionError: Expected balance 45, got 50.0 E assert 50.0 == 45

testcase.name: test_08_get_specific_member_by_id

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 50.0 == 45 + where 50.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb6a9f849200>('current_balance') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb6a9f849200> = {'adjustments': 0.0, 'bonus': 0.0, 'club_id': 'jams-club', 'club_name': 'JAMS Club', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_excel_import.py:163: in test_08_get_specific_member_by_id assert member.get("current_balance") == 45 E AssertionError: assert 50.0 == 45 E + where 50.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb6a9f849200>('current_balance') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb6a9f849200> = {'adjustments': 0.0, 'bonus': 0.0, 'club_id': 'jams-club', 'club_name': 'JAMS Club', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_09_leaderboard_shows_reese_first

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 50.0 == 45 + where 50.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb6a9f677e00>('current_balance') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb6a9f677e00> = {'current_balance': 50.0, 'display_name': 'Reese Hoban', 'member_id': 'Mem-05152'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_excel_import.py:180: in test_09_leaderboard_shows_reese_first assert top_member.get("current_balance") == 45 E AssertionError: assert 50.0 == 45 E + where 50.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb6a9f677e00>('current_balance') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb6a9f677e00> = {'current_balance': 50.0, 'display_name': 'Reese Hoban', 'member_id': 'Mem-05152'}.get
